ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF. All fields legible. Original certificate with ICC stamp and security code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear, text-based PDF. All fields legible. Original commercial invoice with company logo.

lc_validation.explanation: The certificate contains 'L/C NO. 151591LC25000008' in box 5 (Remarks). 'L/C NO.' is a separate field label/descriptor that is an established abbreviation for 'Letter of Credit Number'. This is NOT a reference number containing 'LC' as a substring — the 'L/C NO.' label clearly identifies this as a Letter of Credit reference. The same reference appears in the invoice description field as 'L/C NO. 151591LC25000008' and the invoice also states 'PAYMENT TERMS: LETTER OF CREDIT'. LC-undantag activates per avsnitt 2.2.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 — company logo/header area: 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS' (branding text)
Invoice page 1 — seller/issuer block at bottom: 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB, STORA BADHUSGATAN 18-20, 411 21 GOTEBORG, SWEDEN'
Invoice page 1 — bottom right signature area: 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB'

pairing_validation.explanation: Certificate references invoice no. 11030; invoice is numbered 11030. Certificate consignor 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB' is the invoice issuer. Certificate consignee 'SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED' matches the invoice BUYER. All three criteria met.

rules_applied.description: LC-undantag aktiverat. Ursprungsland är den enda kontrollpunkt som verifieras vid LC.
Identifiering av ursprungsland i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' i ett explicit origin-fält i varubeskrivningen.
MATCH: Ursprungslandet i certifikatet (SWEDEN) kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturan (COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN).

comparison_steps.action: Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Found 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' in invoice description section — this is a dedicated origin field.

comparison_steps.action: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin after normalization
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'SWEDEN' → normalized: 'sweden'. Invoice: 'SWEDEN' → normalized: 'sweden'. EXACT MATCH.

comparison_steps.action: Verify LC-specific requirement: origin in explicit origin field
comparison_steps.result: The origin 'SWEDEN' appears in an explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field in the invoice. This satisfies the LC requirement per avsnitt 2.2 that origin must be in an explicit origin-field.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN' as country of origin. The invoice contains 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' as an explicit dedicated origin field in the product description section. After normalization (case), both values are 'sweden' — exact match. The LC-specific requirement that the origin must appear in an explicit origin-field (avsnitt 2.2) is satisfied. No conflicting origin information exists in the invoice. Result: MATCH with high confidence.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' (box 3) kan entydigt identifieras i fakturans explicita ursprungsfält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. Exakt matchning efter normalisering. LC-kravet att ursprung ska finnas i explicit origin-fält är uppfyllt.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin not verifiable because it only appears in address
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Origin explicitly stated in dedicated 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field in invoice, not derived from address.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: LC-undantag aktiverat. Certifikatet innehåller 'L/C NO. 151591LC25000008' i box 5. 'L/C NO.' är en separat banktermsbenämning (fältrubrik), inte en del av ett referensnummer. Fakturan bekräftar 'PAYMENT TERMS: LETTER OF CREDIT' och samma LC-referens. Alla kontrollpunkter utom ursprungsland sätts till NOT_APPLICABLE.
Fil 1 (Document A) identifierad som certifikat. Fil 2 (Document B) identifierad som faktura. Fakturanummer 11030 matchar certifikatets referens. Parning godkänd.

PASS. Alla tre kriterier uppfyllda: (1) Invoice number 11030 matchar, (2) Consignor GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB identifierad som fakturautställare, (3) Consignee SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED identifierad som BUYER i fakturan.
MATCH. 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' identifierat i explicit origin-fält i fakturans produktbeskrivningssektion.
MATCH. Certifikatets 'SWEDEN' identifieras exakt i fakturans 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en Letter of Credit-referens, vilket innebär att enbart ursprungslandet verifieras. Certifikatet anger ursprungsland Sverige och fakturan bekräftar uttryckligen 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: LC-undantag aktiverat. Enda verifierade kontrollpunkt: ursprungsland. Certifikatet anger SWEDEN, fakturan bekräftar COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN. Exakt matchning. Alla övriga kontrollpunkter NOT_APPLICABLE per LC-undantag.

consistency_check.notes: One applicable checkpoint (country_of_origin) has status MATCH with confidence 0.99 (above 0.85 floor). Four checkpoints NOT_APPLICABLE due to LC exception. No inconsistencies detected.

sections.rule_applied: Avsnitt 4.5.1 och 4.5.5 — Ursprungsland identifierat i explicit origin-fält i fakturan. Exakt matchning efter normalisering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger SWEDEN som ursprungsland i box 3. Fakturan anger 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' i ett dedikerat ursprungsfält i varubeskrivningen. Exakt matchning. LC-kravet (avsnitt 2.2) att ursprungsland ska finnas i ett explicit origin-fält i fakturan är uppfyllt.

human_readable_report.final_result: IDENTICAL — Samtliga tillämpliga kontrollpunkter verifierade som MATCH. LC-undantag aktiverat; enbart ursprungsland verifierat. Dokumentparet bedöms som identiskt och kan godkännas automatiskt.

output_quality_checks.notes: All quality checks passed. One applicable checkpoint (country_of_origin) with MATCH status and confidence 0.99. Four NOT_APPLICABLE checkpoints due to LC exception. Overall result IDENTICAL is consistent.
